title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 327.281 - Unauthorized practice prohibited
text:
327.281.  Unauthorized practice prohibited. — No person, including any duly elected county surveyor, shall practice as a professional land surveyor in Missouri as defined in section 327.272 unless and until there is issued to such person a license or a certificate of authority certifying that such person has been duly licensed as a professional land surveyor in Missouri, and unless such license or certificate has been renewed as provided in section 327.351.
(L. 1969 S.B. 117, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16, A.L. 1999 H.B. 343)
